item.title: 0.4.0 beta (build 22)
item.description:
Groovyday 0.4.0 private beta

  • Dockscape replaces Desktop with a full-width scene rising from behind the system Dock
  • The strip follows Dock height at an adjustable 1.5×, 1.75×, or 2× and rotates for side Docks
  • Waves, Halo, Particles, and Skyline receive compositions tuned for the shallow architectural canvas
  • Existing Desktop preferences and the ⌃⌥3 shortcut migrate automatically

This is an opt-in development build for personal testing.
